name: the-checklist-manifesto
description: Atul Gawande's The Checklist Manifesto — manage complexity and prevent errors in high-stakes environments
useCase: Helps professionals and teams design effective checklists, reduce errors, manage complexity, and build a culture of discipline in high-stakes work.
knownRisks: Checklists complement expertise but don't replace judgment — they are tools for discipline, not substitutes for skill
